description: 151 - 28-03-2025 - Email between Peter Mandelson and Sir Oliver Robbins. (former Permanent Under-Secretary at FCDO)

participants.name: Email between Peter Mandelson and Sir Oliver Robbins.

text:
(former Permanent Under-Secretary at FCDO)

From: Oliver Robbins! Personal
Sent: Fri 28/03/2025 4:00:36 PM (UTC)
To: Peter Mandelson Personal ; Caroline
Hurndall Personal
Subject: Re: Tariff advice as seen from Washington
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Useful to see - thank you. Unfortunately I didn’t see it in time for our last-minute pre-brief
with the FS.

Olly

Oliver Robbins
FCDO

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: Friday, March 28, 2025 3:25:33 PM
To: Caroline Hurndall ; Oliver Robbins
Subject: Fw: Tariff advice as seen from Washington

Ihave not been asked to submit advice to No10. They are meeting now to discuss options so
I submitted this uninvited, I am afraid only ten minutes beforehand when I found out about
the meeting.

Best Peter

Get Outlook for iOS

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: Friday, March 28, 2025 11:10:09 AM
To: Michael Ellam ; Morgan McSweeney ; Jonathan Powell ; PM Private Office Support Team - Internal ;
Ailsa Terry (No.10)

Cec: JCS ; Mungo Woodifield ; Ninjeri Pandit ; Varun Chandra
Subject: Re: Tariff advice as seen from Washington
Thanks

Get Outlook for iOS

445

From: Ailsa Terry

Sent: Friday, March 28, 2025 11:02:17 AM

To: Peter Mandelson ; Michael Ellam ; Morgan McSweeney ; Jonathan Powell ; PM Private Office
Support Team - Internal

ce Jcs ; Mungo Woodifield ; Ninjeri Pandit ; Varun Chandra
Subject: RE: Tariff advice as seen from Washington
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Peter

Thank you. Confirming receipt and we will highlight this advice to the PM when we
pre brief him shortly. @PM Private Office Support Team - Internal could you print a
copy of this for me to take in?

Ccing Varun and Nin.

Ailsa

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: 28 March 2025 14:55
To: Ailsa Terry : Michael Ellam ; Morgan McSweeney ; Jonathan
Powell Ce: Jcs : Mungo Woodifield
Subject: Tariff advice as seen from Washington
Importance: High

Ailsa,
The Prime Minister and President agreed to explore an economic partnership

Peter

446
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
